understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate the grid level to reach the goal gem tile ('+'), using horizontal moves and click interactions to remove obstacles, while avoiding spike hazards that end the run, all within a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves only left or right; after each move, gravity (downward in this level) automatically pulls the player until they land on a solid support tile, hit a spike, or reach the goal. Click actions remove breakable tiles ('x') at target coordinates to open fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. The game provides structured previews (landing positions and corridor scans) to show fall destinations. Gravity direction and spike placement are level-specific, and moves consume steps from a turn budget.
